game.title: BlastSimulator2026
game.subtitle: Dig. Blast. Profit.
rock.cruite.name: Cruite
rock.cruite.desc: Soft, chalky, crumbles if you look at it wrong.
rock.sandite.name: Sandite
rock.sandite.desc: Compacted sand pretending to be rock.
rock.molite.name: Molite
rock.molite.desc: Soft and yielding, like warm butter with grit.
rock.grumpite.name: Grumpite
rock.grumpite.desc: Grumpy-looking stone that resists with a frown.
rock.clunkite.name: Clunkite
rock.clunkite.desc: Makes a satisfying clunk when you hit it.
rock.stubite.name: Stubite
rock.stubite.desc: Stubbornly refuses to fracture on the first try.
rock.obstiite.name: Obstiite
rock.gnarlite.name: Gnarlite
rock.absurdite.name: Absurdite
rock.absurdite.desc: Absurdly hard. Nature's joke on miners.
rock.titanite.name: Titanite
rock.titanite.desc: Titan-class hardness. Only Dynatomics will crack it.
ore.dirtite.name: Dirtite
ore.dirtite.desc: Barely qualifies as ore. Bulk filler.
ore.rustite.name: Rustite
ore.blingite.name: Blingite
ore.gloomium.name: Gloomium
ore.sparkium.name: Sparkium
ore.craktonite.name: Craktonite
ore.craktonite.desc: Cracks under pressure, but worth a fortune.
ore.absurdium.name: Absurdium
ore.absurdium.desc: Absurdly valuable. Found in the hardest rocks.
ore.treranium.name: Treranium
explosive.pop_rock.name: Pop-Rock
explosive.pop_rock.desc: Party popper energy. Good for chalk.
explosive.boomite.name: Boomite
explosive.boomite.desc: Reliable ANFO-style bang for your buck.
explosive.krackle.name: Krackle
explosive.krackle.desc: Water-resistant emulsion. Works in the rain.
explosive.big_bada_boom.name: Big Bada Boom
explosive.shatternite.name: Shatternite
explosive.rumblox.name: Rumblox
explosive.rumblox.desc: Makes the ground rumble for miles.
explosive.obliviax.name: Obliviax
explosive.dynatomics.name: Dynatomics
explosive.dynatomics.desc: The endgame monster. Handle with fear.
mine.desert.name: Desert Quarry
mine.desert.desc: Flat, dry, soft rocks. Easy money to get started.
mine.mountain.name: Mountain Ridge
mine.mountain.desc: Steep terrain, harder rocks, better ore.
mine.tropical.name: Tropical Depths
mine.tropical.desc: Dense jungle canopy above endgame rocks and rare ore.
building.worker_quarters.name: Worker Quarters
building.worker_quarters.desc: Bunks and bad coffee. Home sweet home.
building.storage_depot.name: Storage Depot
building.storage_depot.desc: Where rubble waits for its destiny.
building.vehicle_depot.name: Vehicle Depot
building.vehicle_depot.desc: Park your trucks. Try not to block the exit.
building.office.name: Office
building.break_room.name: Break Room
building.break_room.desc: Stale donuts and a TV that only gets one channel.
building.canteen.name: Canteen
building.canteen.desc: Mystery meat Mondays keep morale... interesting.
building.medical_bay.name: Medical Bay
building.medical_bay.desc: Band-aids and aspirin. What more do you need?
building.explosives_magazine.name: Explosives Magazine
building.explosives_magazine.desc: Store your boom sticks. No smoking within 50m.
vehicle.truck.name: Truck
vehicle.excavator.name: Excavator
vehicle.drill_rig.name: Drill Rig
vehicle.bulldozer.name: Bulldozer
